This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.dup_count_at_time: Duplicate count at time of submission

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

deductCredits(bytes32,uint256).notice: Deduct credits for claim. Only callable by VendClaim.

dupCount(bytes32).notice: Duplicate count per EAN+location (for decay calculation)

firstMoverPaid(bytes32).notice: Tracks which submissions have already paid first-mover bonus

ifrPremium(bytes32).notice: IFR Premium flag per user (legacy, use tierLevel instead)

payFirstMoverBonus(bytes32).notice: Pay the first-mover 2x bonus (delayed, after confirmation)

rewardSubmission(bytes32,uint32).notice: Grant base reward when a submission is created

setTier(bytes32,uint8).notice: Set tier for a user (Phase 1: owner; Phase 3: auto)

silentConsensusPaid(bytes32).notice: Tracks which submissions have triggered silent consensus reward
